title: Blue Iris
content:
Blue is the Adrian sea, and darkly blue
    The �gean; and the shafted sun thro' them,
    That fishes grope to, gives the beamy hue
    Rayed from her iris's deep diadem.
meaning:
Maurice Henry Hewlett's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Blue Iris"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
